short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $3.62B in FY2026 Q2, +37.2% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $2.95B (-18.5% vs current Q) — set by 29 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $2.10 vs current $2.40.
Margin context: 32.5% net margin — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-08-19 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $13B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $12B → FY2 $13B (+10.4% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 28.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +34.9% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Information Technology): Multi-year AI/cloud capex cycle remains the dominant secular theme.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if growth durability + margin expansion both hold.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 58.5% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 1.08 — balanced flow.
30-day implied move: ±11.0% ($354.32 – $441.78) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.

Front-month OI cluster: $390.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Bull call spread 30 DTE: long $398 / short $418. Mid IV (59%) + uptrend → defined-risk directional with reasonable cost basis.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 44.2% across 6 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 6 dates spanning 121–611 DTE.
393-day implied move: ±46.1% ($214.68 – $581.42) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $275 (-30.9% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-14.3pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $358 put / short $438 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
